Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

While all of these patches relate to the 4.5 kernel, they are not really dependent on each other.  It would be better to submit them separately instead of in a series, so that they can land independently.  For example, this patch has passed testing, but the previous patch has not, so this patch could not be landed until the previous one is.

If this patch needs to be refreshed for some other reason (e.g. patch conflict, though it seems unlikely), please submit it directly against master.

parents.subject: LU-6401 headers: Move object_update functions to new header

commit.subject: LU-8056 socklnd: NETIF_F_ALL_CSUM renamed to NETIF_F_CSUM_MASK
commit.message:
LU-8056 socklnd: NETIF_F_ALL_CSUM renamed to NETIF_F_CSUM_MASK

In kernel 4.5 NETIF_F_CSUM_MASK got renamed to NETIF_F_CSUM_MASK.
This patch handles the name change.

Linux-commit:a188222b6ed29404ac2d4232d35d1fe0e77af370

Signed-off-by: Li Dongyang <dongyang.li@anu.edu.au>
Change-Id: Id57505eeca613303c584d3cf74284920a837bb43
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/20222
Reviewed-by: Doug Oucharek <doug.s.oucharek@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
